mapper.insert: INSERT INTO members (id, password, name, gender, phone, created_at) VALUES (#{Id}, #{password}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{phone}, GETDATE())
mapper.select: select id, password, name, gender, phone, profileImagePath from members where id = #{Id}
mapper.update:
UPDATE members
name = #{name}, phone = #{phone},
profileImagePath = #{profileImagePath},
WHERE id = #{Id}
